    recordCharge(CustomerCharge) - Method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerCharge
    Records a credit transaction made by an account-holding customer.
    recordReminder(CustomerReminder) - Method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerReminder
    Records a reminder sent to a customer.
    recordSale(SaleService.Sale) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.sales.SaleService
    Records a sale in the database and returns the ID of the record so that it can be used to link products to a sale.
    recordSaleItem(SaleService.SaleItem) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.sales.SaleService
    Records an item in a sale in the database.
    recordSpend(CustomerMonthlySpend) - Method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.customer.CustomerMonthlySpend
    Upsert method that records a customer's monthly spend.

    runDailyDebtEvaluation() - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.debt.DebtAutomationService
    This method is for continuing the debt evaluation process after the first reminder has been sent.
    runDebtEvaluation() - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.cust.debt.DebtAutomationService
    A monthly debt evaluation that checks the balance of each customer and initiates the debt escalation process.
